summary: Implemented all 5 CRUD endpoints, JWT authentication with refresh tokens, token-bucket rate limiting (100 req/min), and input validation. All 10 acceptance criteria pass. Database migration included.

checklist.item: All CRUD endpoints respond with correct status codes
JWT authentication works for protected routes

checkpoints.description: Session 1: Scaffolded project, set up Gin router and config
Session 2: Implemented CRUD handlers + repository + migrations
Session 3: Added JWT auth, rate limiting, ran all acceptance tests

decisions.reason: dgrijalva is unmaintained; v5 is the community-maintained fork

decisions.decision: Implemented custom token-bucket rate limiter instead of using gin-contrib/limit
decisions.reason: Requirement specifies per-IP limiting with specific headers; custom impl gives full control

decisions.decision: Used soft-delete (deleted_at column) instead of hard delete
decisions.reason: Specified in FR-1: DELETE should set deleted_at, not remove row

issues_encountered.issue: Connection pool exhaustion under concurrent test load
issues_encountered.resolution: Configured max 20 connections as specified in NFR, added idle connection timeout
